blended.narrative: Ski Cooper is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 10,413 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 26".
